reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the heights of 712 Fifth Avenue and the Manhattan Life Insurance Building.
2. Compare the heights and return the taller tower.
original_final_question: Which tower is taller, 712 Fifth Avenue or Manhattan Life Insurance Building? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: 712 Fifth Avenue is 650 ft tall, while the Manhattan Life Insurance Building was 348 ft tall, so 712 5th Avenue is taller. -> 712 5th Avenue
